creator: yvesguerin@yahoo.ca
text:
(fresh install of 6.4)
I did a install via the port of the net/ipw-firmware:

cd /usr/ports/net/ipw-firmware/

I did a "make install clean"

I double check the rc script (ipw)

[root@pbsd /usr/ports/net/ipw-firmware-kmod]# ls /etc/rc.d
ipw

all the rc scripts are gone away (deleted).

Fix: 

modify the mtree command, may be
How-To-Repeat: do an installation of the net/ipw-firmware from the port
